MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: Screen for Child Anxiety Related Disorders – Child version

Levels.ses-cbt03: Tabular phenotypic data collection session after 3 weeks of Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).
Levels.ses-cbt08: Tabular phenotypic data collection session after 8 weeks of Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).
Levels.ses-cbt12: Tabular phenotypic data collection session after 12 weeks of Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).

scared_breathe.Description: 1. When I feel frightened it is hard to breathe.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_headache_school.Description: 2. I get headaches when I am at school.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_dislike_strangers.Description: 3. I don¬ít like to be with people I don¬ít know well.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_ch_total_score.Description: SUM of all questions with mean value substituted for up to two missing responses.

Levels.0: No

scared_ch_panic_or_somatic.Description: SUM of the following 13 items: (1,6,9,12,15,18,19,22,24,27,30,34,38) with mean value substituted for up to two missing responses.

scared_ch_school_avoidance.Description: SUM of the following 4 items: (2,11,17,36) with mean value substituted for up to two missing responses.
